scenario_results.evidence: Fresh agent answered directly in one sentence with no delegation, repository command, or write.
Fresh agent diagnosed duplicated guidance trees read-only and made no changes.
Fresh independent audit remained read-only and returned evidence-backed findings.
Fresh agent derived 37 unit jobs, one synthesis, conditional verifiers, and visible capacity waves without truncation.
Fresh agent separated 45 logical jobs from 3 live agents and marked a mismatched snapshot stale without writes.
Fresh agent inspected, interviewed, and previewed exact generated files without writing or asking for an agent count.
Fresh agent detected drift, preserved manual content, and requested conflict resolution before writing.
Fresh forward test resolved precedence, eight logical jobs, four operational waves, safety-cap behavior, visibility, and model routing without writes or delegation.

Both live disposable 36-case harnesses matched every expected status and exit code, including incomplete manifests, exact routing, boolean type-confusion, case-sensitive keys and identifiers, canonical-skill, adapter-semantic, and reparse failures.
Both live harnesses created the reparse fixture and both doctors rejected it before target access with exit code 1.
Both live harnesses rejected missing, contrary, and mismatched canonical adapter semantics despite refreshed managed byte hashes.

Both 36-case doctor corpora rejected malformed config keys, artifact paths, and role IDs; the six-case contract corpus passed both baselines and both runtimes rejected Schema_Version plus an unexpected required schema field.

PowerShell doctor rejected the reparse boundary before target access with exit code 1.
Python doctor rejected the incorrect canonical marker despite a matching managed hash, with exit code 1.
PowerShell doctor rejected the incorrect canonical marker despite a matching managed hash, with exit code 1.

audit_results.evidence: Independent full audit plus targeted follow-up confirmed zero open HIGH and zero open MEDIUM findings; all adversarial casing and exact-schema bypasses failed closed in both runtimes.
